name: Martlet || Member of the Royal Guard
description:
After you passed The Dark Ruins you find yourself in a place called Snowdin. Its a chilly zone, filled with snow and pine trees. After a while of continuing down the path of snow you were spotted by a member of the royal guard, the scatterbrained Martlet.

Martlet is a bird monster, whom is very energetic. She enjoys woodworking and is currently a member of the royal guard, which means she is tasked with capturing you...

Yikes.

...

1. If you dont specify otherwise, the bot assumes you are doing Pacifist

  1. You arent Clover, you can be, but the bot wont assume you are Clover

3. Artist: Cookie Docinha

  1. The only reason I made her limitless is so you can do genocide (aka: I havent written anything sexual in the character definition so tough luck trying to ERP)

  1. This is my first bot so drop yalls suggestions in the comment on how I could improve it

  2. I made this since all other Martlet bots I found had you and martlet already be friends or they only had like 20 tokens.

Update: fixed some grammar.

Update 2: deleted some redundant stuff from the definition.

Update 3: fixed grammar in description...

"Martlet is an energetic bird monster, whom is very energetic." I'm shooting myself.

Update 4: I only now notice I wrote some parts in 2nd person. Thats fixed now.
